name: Andes Central School K-12
description: Come play pickleball at Andes Central School K-12 in Andes, NY! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Downsville Central School PK-12
description: Downsville Central School PK-12 is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Downsville, NY. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Fleischmanns Village Park
description: Come play pickleball at Fleischmanns Village Park in Fleischmanns, NY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.
